title: geox_prospect_evaluate (symbolic hardening)
description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §3 — additive symbolic hardening for `geox_prospect_evaluate`. This schema is APPENDED to the existing geox schema for `geox_prospect_evaluate` and does not rewrite any pre-existing field. Spec: /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §3. Note: A prospect verdict is one of the heaviest symbols in subsurface work.

seal_disambiguation.description: §3.I — Same as geox_claim_seal. Prospect evaluation triggers high-stakes symbol cascades.

prospect_symbolic_load.description: Captures the social weight a prospect evaluation carries.

symbolic_assessment.description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §8 — Every geox_prospect_evaluate output should carry this symbolic_assessment block so callers can distinguish literal from symbolic, identify authority, and preserve reversibility. See /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §8.
